mapper.update: UPDATE ComMember SET UserPW = #{userPw}, UserName = #{userName}, UseYn = #{useYn}, UpdateDate = #{updateDate}, UpdateUserID = #{updateUserId} WHERE UserID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT UserID AS userId, UserName AS userName, LogInDate AS loginDate, UseYn AS useYn, InsertDate AS insertDate, UpdateDate AS updateDate, InsertUserID AS insertUserId, UpdateUserID AS updateUserId FROM ComMember ORDER BY UserID
